In [9]:
from azure.storage.blob import ContainerClient

url = "https://noaanormals.blob.core.windows.net/climate-normals"
container = ContainerClient.from_container_url(url)
In [10]:
import dask_gateway

cluster = dask_gateway.GatewayCluster()
client = cluster.get_client()
cluster.scale(12)
print(cluster.dashboard_link)

https://pccompute.westeurope.cloudapp.azure.com/compute/services/dask-gateway/clusters/prod.152271f470a24e199dd9f5f25fab32b3/status
In [11]:
from collections import defaultdict

products = []
for blob in container.walk_blobs():
    products.append(blob.name[0:-1])

print(products)
subproduct_names = ["1981-2010/access", "1991-2020/access", "2006-2020/access"]
subproducts = []
for product in products:
    for subproduct_name in subproduct_names:
        subproducts.append(f"{product}/{subproduct_name}")
        
print(subproducts)

['normals-annualseasonal', 'normals-daily', 'normals-hourly', 'normals-monthly']
['normals-annualseasonal/1981-2010/access', 'normals-annualseasonal/1991-2020/access', 'normals-annualseasonal/2006-2020/access', 'normals-daily/1981-2010/access', 'normals-daily/1991-2020/access', 'normals-daily/2006-2020/access', 'normals-hourly/1981-2010/access', 'normals-hourly/1991-2020/access', 'normals-hourly/2006-2020/access', 'normals-monthly/1981-2010/access', 'normals-monthly/1991-2020/access', 'normals-monthly/2006-2020/access']
In [12]:
from dataclasses import dataclass
import dask
import os.path
from typing import List

@dataclass
class BlobInfo:
    count: int
    size: int

def csv_blob_infos(subproduct: str) -> BlobInfo:
    count = 0
    size = 0
    for blob in container.list_blobs(name_starts_with=subproduct):
        if os.path.splitext(blob.name)[1] == ".csv":
            count += 1
            size += blob.size
    return BlobInfo(count, size)
    
    
for subproduct in subproducts:
    blob_infos = [dask.delayed(csv_blob_infos)(subproduct) for subproduct in subproducts]

sizes_delayed = dask.delayed(dict)(dask.delayed(zip)(subproducts, blob_infos))
sizes_delayed.visualize()
Out[12]:
In [13]:
sizes = sizes_delayed.compute()
In [14]:
with open(f"noaa-climate-normals-summary.txt", "w") as file:
    file.write("product,count,size (GB),average size (MB)\n")
    for product, blob_info in sizes.items():
        file.write(f"{product},{blob_info.count},{blob_info.size / 1e9},{blob_info.size / blob_info.count / 1e6}\n")
In [15]:
import pandas

modis_product_summary = pandas.read_csv("noaa-climate-normals-summary.txt")
modis_product_summary
Out[15]:
product count size (GB) average size (MB)
0 normals-annualseasonal/1981-2010/access 9839 0.204140 0.020748

2 normals-annualseasonal/2006-2020/access 13471 0.352137 0.026140
3 normals-daily/1981-2010/access 9839 1.657975 0.168511

In [16]:
cluster.close()
